toolchain.version: Vitis HLS 2026.x on WINDOWS (free Basic tier). Dev host = Windows PC (Ryzen 7 2700X / 32GB / GTX1080).
toolchain.license_note: Since 2026.1 (announced 2026-05-25) the free Basic tier is WINDOWS-ONLY; Linux now requires a paid Core tier (~$1200-1800/yr). xc7z020 is an entry-level part and is expected in the Basic tier — VERIFY the Basic-tier device list at install. If ever switching to Linux, pin <=2025.2 (still free on Linux). Match the competition's mandated version when tasks release.
toolchain.competition_version: TBD — set when FPT'26 tasks drop; if they mandate 2026.1+, Windows free Basic is the only no-cost path.

target.board: PYNQ-Z2 (dev only; NOT assumed to be the evaluator target)
